content:
Post 1
ASX closed at 8,614 pts last week as Wall St momentum and a softer USD kept bulls in charge. The tension this week: can the rally hold with AU jobs data and global earnings due? Cautiously bullish — but 8,600 is the line. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2
🏦 Banks face AU employment data Thu — a strong print lifts rate-cut doubt and pressures margins. ⛏️ Miners watch iron ore near $95/t; any China stimulus signal this week could reprice the majors fast. #banking #ironore #ASX

Post 3
📈 ResMed reports US earnings this week — offshore revenue sensitivity to USD moves makes it a bellwether for ASX healthcare. Stock has run hard; the number to beat is consensus 8% revenue growth. #ASX #healthcare #ausbiz

Post 4
S&P 500 sits near record highs above 5,600 pts. US earnings season is mid-stride — any miss from mega-cap tech this week hits ASX tech and dual-listed names hard at the open. Risk tone is the swing factor. #ASX #ausbiz #globalmarkets

Post 5
AU jobs data Thu is the week's pivot. Market prices ~65% chance of an RBA cut by Sep. A jobs beat above 20,000 kills that trade; a miss accelerates it. Banks short vs REITs long is the classic asymmetric play. Which side are you on? #RBA #ASX #ausbiz

Post 1

ASX 200 barely moved Monday — down just 5.40pts to 8,791.30 — but the real story was underneath. Tech sold off hard while energy surged. A flat index hiding a sharp rotation. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🔺 Energy led all sectors +1.80% as the standout winner. 📉 Info Tech dropped -1.55%, dragging the index lower. Two sectors, opposite directions, net result: almost nothing. Classic rotation session. #ASX #energy #tech

Post 3

⛏️ South32 surged +4.62% to AUD 4.08, one of the session's clearest winners. Meanwhile MinRes shed -3.86% to AUD 54.59. Same sector, opposite outcomes — stock selection mattered today. #ASX #mining

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,739.10/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6984. Silver AUD 81.29/oz. Precious metals holding firm, supporting energy and materials bulls even as broader materials sector dipped -0.34%. #gold #silver #commodities #ASX

Post 5

Watch Energy's +1.80% lead — can it hold if oil softens overnight? AUD/USD at 0.6984 is the key FX line. Does this rotation have legs, or does Tech bounce back Tuesday? Drop your call below. #ASX #ausbiz #energy
